svg.title: Sheet Music for "Smith's Reel"

text.tspan: D G D A · | Bm G D A · | ·· OR ·· | D G D/Bm E7/A7 | D/Bm G D/Bm E7/A7
D G A A/D | Bm G A A/D | ········ | D G D/Bm A7/D· | D/Bm G D/Bm A7/D
Notes: Adapted and arranged by Cam Cross (my parts first, Joey's second).
I've seen some versions where the first chord in the A-part is Bm. I want to like it, but it sounds a little off.
